                    b.Property<Guid>("CastMemberId")
                        .HasColumnType("uniqueidentifier");

                    b.Property<string>("Role")
                        .IsRequired()
                        .HasMaxLength(200)
                        .IsUnicode(true)
                        .HasColumnType("nvarchar(200)");

                    b.HasKey("SceneId", "CastMemberId");

                    b.HasIndex("CastMemberId");

                    b.ToTable("ScenesCastMembers");

            modelBuilder.Entity("Wrap.Data.Models.Production", b =>
                {
                    b.Property<Guid>("Id")
                        .ValueGeneratedOnAdd()
                        .HasColumnType("uniqueidentifier");

                    b.Property<decimal>("Budget")
                        .HasColumnType("DECIMAL(18,2)");

                    b.Property<Guid>("CreatedByUserId")
                        .HasColumnType("uniqueidentifier");

                    b.Property<string>("Description")
                        .HasMaxLength(2000)
                        .IsUnicode(true)
                        .HasColumnType("nvarchar(2000)");

                    b.Property<DateTime?>("StatusEndDate")
                        .HasColumnType("DATETIME2");

                    b.Property<DateTime>("StatusStartDate")
                        .HasColumnType("DATETIME2");

                    b.Property<int>("StatusType")
                        .HasColumnType("int");

                    b.Property<string>("Thumbnail")
                        .HasMaxLength(500)
                        .IsUnicode(true)
                        .HasColumnType("nvarchar(500)");

                    b.Property<string>("Title")
                        .IsRequired()
                        .HasMaxLength(200)
                        .IsUnicode(true)
                        .HasColumnType("nvarchar(200)");

                    b.HasKey("Id");

                    b.HasIndex("CreatedByUserId");

                    b.ToTable("Productions");

                            StatusStartDate = new DateTime(2026, 2, 8, 0, 0, 0, 0, DateTimeKind.Utc),

            modelBuilder.Entity("Wrap.Data.Models.ProductionAsset", b =>
                {
                    b.Property<Guid>("Id")
                        .ValueGeneratedOnAdd()
                        .HasColumnType("uniqueidentifier");

                    b.Property<int>("AssetType")
                        .HasColumnType("int");

                    b.Property<string>("Description")
                        .HasMaxLength(500)
                        .IsUnicode(true)
                        .HasColumnType("nvarchar(500)");

                    b.Property<string>("FilePath")
                        .IsRequired()
                        .HasMaxLength(500)
                        .IsUnicode(true)
                        .HasColumnType("nvarchar(500)");

                    b.Property<Guid>("ProductionId")
                        .HasColumnType("uniqueidentifier");

                    b.Property<string>("Title")
                        .IsRequired()
                        .HasMaxLength(200)
                        .IsUnicode(true)
                        .HasColumnType("nvarchar(200)");

                    b.Property<DateTime>("UploadedAt")
                        .HasColumnType("DATETIME2");

                    b.HasKey("Id");

                    b.HasIndex("ProductionId", "AssetType");

                    b.ToTable("ProductionsAssets");

                    b.HasData(
                        new
                        {
                            Id = new Guid("11111111-cccc-cccc-cccc-111111111111"),
                            AssetType = 1,
                            Description = "Basic scene coverage and camera beats.",
                            FilePath = "/img/assets/default-asset.png",
                            ProductionId = new Guid("819f7100-5b1d-4eee-8b82-8e4084ef0928"),

            modelBuilder.Entity("Wrap.Data.Models.Scene", b =>
                {
                    b.Property<Guid>("Id")
                        .ValueGeneratedOnAdd()
                        .HasColumnType("uniqueidentifier");

                    b.Property<string>("Description")
                        .HasMaxLength(2000)
                        .IsUnicode(true)
                        .HasColumnType("nvarchar(2000)");

                    b.Property<string>("Location")
                        .IsRequired()
                        .HasMaxLength(300)
                        .IsUnicode(true)
                        .HasColumnType("nvarchar(300)");

                    b.Property<Guid>("ProductionId")
                        .HasColumnType("uniqueidentifier");

                    b.Property<string>("SceneName")
                        .IsRequired()
                        .HasMaxLength(200)
                        .IsUnicode(true)
                        .HasColumnType("nvarchar(200)");

                    b.Property<int>("SceneNumber")
                        .HasColumnType("int");

                    b.Property<int>("SceneType")
                        .HasColumnType("int");

                    b.HasKey("Id");

                    b.HasIndex("ProductionId", "SceneNumber");

                    b.ToTable("Scenes");

                    b.HasData(
                        new
                        {
                            Id = new Guid("11111111-bbbb-bbbb-bbbb-111111111111"),

            modelBuilder.Entity("Wrap.Data.Models.Script", b =>
                {
                    b.Property<Guid>("Id")
                        .ValueGeneratedOnAdd()
                        .HasColumnType("uniqueidentifier");

                    b.Property<DateTime>("LastEditedAt")
                        .HasColumnType("DATETIME2");

                    b.Property<Guid>("ProductionId")
                        .HasColumnType("uniqueidentifier");

                    b.Property<int?>("RevisionType")
                        .HasColumnType("int");

                    b.Property<int>("StageType")
                        .HasColumnType("int");

                    b.Property<string>("Title")
                        .IsRequired()
                        .HasMaxLength(200)
                        .IsUnicode(true)
                        .HasColumnType("nvarchar(200)");

                    b.HasKey("Id");

                    b.HasIndex("ProductionId")
                        .IsUnique();

                    b.ToTable("Scripts");

                    b.HasData(
                        new
                        {
                            Id = new Guid("36ca9b58-d902-4195-bf80-2e6518ad3c6d"),
                            LastEditedAt = new DateTime(2026, 3, 26, 13, 22, 5, 0, DateTimeKind.Utc),
